reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Chúng tôi có thẻ VinClub nhưng khách sạn không hỏi khi check in.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách , 
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ phản hồi. Chúng tôi chân thành xin lỗi vì trong quá trình làm thủ tục nhận phòng, nhân viên chưa hỏi và xác nhận thẻ VinClub của Quý khách. Đây là một thiếu sót từ phía chúng tôi và không đúng với quy trình phục vụ tiêu chuẩn của khách sạn.
Ý kiến của Quý khách đã được chuyển đến bộ phận lễ tân và ban quản lý để rà soát, đào tạo lại và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ. Chúng tôi rất trân trọng phản hồi của Quý khách và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được phục vụ Quý khách tốt hơn trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo.
Trân trọng 
Ban quản lý khách sạn Vinpearl Hotel Bắc Ninh

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room interior is very modern and convenient. The TV doesn't have the Netflix app or screen sharing. The staff at the reception, when asked by guests, still have their faces glued to their phones; a colleague next to them has to repeat the question for them to look up and respond: the medical box doesn’t have pain relievers, only Eugo bandages. The breakfast is served in very fancy cast iron pots, heavy, but the fried rice is ice cold. Breakfast is not as good as at other Vinpearl hotels in the chain. A request for the reception to stamp a travel document was also not fulfilled. There is a need for improvement to match the standards of a 5-star hotel.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi quý khách , 
Cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian phản hồi về trải nghiệm lưu trú. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì những bất tiện liên quan đến thái độ phục vụ, tiện ích trong phòng, chất lượng bữa sáng cũng như các hỗ trợ từ bộ phận lễ tân chưa đáp ứng kỳ vọng của Quý Khách.

Những góp ý của Quý Khách đã được chúng tôi nghiêm túc ghi nhận và sẽ được chuyển đến các bộ phận liên quan để rà soát, khắc phục và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Chúng tôi trân trọng hy vọng sẽ sớm được đón tiếp Quý Khách trở lại và mang đến một trải nghiệm xứng tầm tiêu chuẩn 5 sao.
Nguyễn Đình Bồng 
Duty Manager Vinpearl Hotel Bắc Ninh

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is great and close to the city center, the rooms are big and comfortable, and the view is very nice.
reviews.negatives: The cleanliness is not good enough - not when receiving the room, neither during the daily cleaning.

reviews.title: I went believing it was Vinpearl.
reviews.text: Despite being newly built, there are many areas in the bathroom that haven't been cleaned after construction. It seems like only the parts within reach of the cleaning staff were finished. The bed was not bad, and the room size was good. It might have just happened to me, but after going out on the first evening, I found laundry hanging in the room. It seems like the same room number from another floor was mistakenly delivered. When it was time to sleep and I lay down, someone kept ringing the bell until they came out. On the second day, my wife was going to take a shower when a male staff member entered without any sign or knocking. When checking out, I was charged for the laundry service that was delivered on the first evening to my room. The breakfast was also not great, and I was not in a good mood until the end.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued  Guest,

Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconveniences and discomfort you experienced during your stay, especially regarding the cleanliness of the restrooms, the mix-up with the laundry, and the unexpected entry by our staff member. These incidents fall far below the standards we strive to maintain.

Please rest assured that we are taking your comments very seriously and will conduct a thorough review with our housekeeping and operations teams to prevent such issues from recurring. We also apologize for any confusion related to the laundry charges and will investigate this matter promptly.

We regret that your overall experience, including the breakfast, did not meet your expectations and affected your stay negatively. Your feedback is invaluable to us as we work to improve our services.

We hope to have the opportunity to restore your confidence in our hotel in the future.

Kind regards,
Nguyen Dinh Bong 
Duty Manager

reviews.title: Stain on the name Vinpearl
reviews.text: Since it's a new building, everything is new, but it still has a strong smell of a new house. I also requested room cleaning, but the dining table still shows traces of not being wiped, and the bed sheets were left unchanged. I was quite disappointed as I had high expectations after trying out Vinpearl in other regions.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We truly appreciate your honesty, and we are sorry to hear that your recent stay did not fully meet your expectations.

As a newly opened property, we understand that the new-building smell may still be noticeable, and we sincerely apologize for any discomfort this may have caused. We are taking steps to improve ventilation to ensure a fresher and more comfortable environment for all our guests.

We are also very concerned to hear about the housekeeping issues you encountered. Your room should have been cleaned thoroughly, including proper table cleaning and linen replacement when requested. This falls below our service standards, and we will be addressing this matter immediately with our housekeeping team to prevent such oversights in the future.

Your high expectations, especially as a returning Vinpearl guest, are completely understandable, and we regret that we did not deliver the experience

reviews.title: Bac Ninh standout
reviews.text:
The staff here were wonderful. Check in was a breeze, within 10 mins I was in my room relaxing. The room was very spacious, within standing shower and separate soaking tub. The bed is comfortable and pillows have enough structure to let me sleep well. 

The breakfast has a lot of options including a noodle soup station with 3 preset options to choose from. There is an egg station, where you can customize your omelette and even order eggs Benedict. Wide selection of pastries as walk in.  Most importantly they have the Vietnamese coffee station, where you can make yourself a premixed iced coffee or hot coffee with condensed milk. 

Star 32 bar is the rooftop bar. The have live music on Saturdays but open ever day to enjoy the amazing view of Bac Ninh. 

Overall I really enjoyed my stay here and look forward to a return trip.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. John,

A big thank you from all of us at Vinpearl Hotel Bac Ninh for your fantastic feedback!

We are so glad you had a great time with us. Creating happy memories for our guests is what we love to do, and we're happy we did just that for you.

Can’t wait to welcome you back for another wonderful stay!

Best wishes,
Bùi Ngọc Tú
Duty Manager
Vinpearl Hotel Bắc Ninh
